codeReview.summary: The api-health-endpoint feature is correctly implemented. The GET /api/health endpoint was already present in src/server.ts and returns {status: 'ok'} with HTTP 200. The worker added comprehensive tests in tests/api/health.test.ts that verify the endpoint behavior. The implementation fully meets the feature requirements and is actively used by services.yaml for the API service healthcheck.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The health endpoint implementation follows the established pattern in src/server.ts - simple inline handler using c.json(). This is consistent with AGENTS.md guidance for Hono routes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/server.ts:17-19 - Health check endpoint uses c.json({ status: 'ok' }) pattern

sharedStateObservations.observation: The services.yaml correctly references the /api/health endpoint for the API service healthcheck, confirming the endpoint is properly integrated into the deployment infrastructure.

summary: The api-health-endpoint feature passes review. The implementation in src/server.ts correctly returns HTTP 200 with {status: 'ok'} JSON response. The worker added 3 comprehensive tests covering status code, response body, and Content-Type header. The endpoint is actively used by services.yaml for health checking. No issues found.
